name: Monterey Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole dish, layer crumbled tortilla chips, turkey, creamed corn, and picante sauce.
Top with sliced black olives and shredded cheddar cheese.
2. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until hot. Add chopped green or red pepper on top if desired.
Serve with additional tortilla chips. Serves 4.
